description: Division-aware display scoring for LPL Split 2. group_internal_score is only comparable inside a division; rating_score is for cross-division display.
notes: Manual groups are used first because LPL Split 2 has separate Dengfeng/Niepan schedules.
The baseline adjustment is display-layer only. It does not bypass odds-core gates or rewrite backtest model probabilities.
If the official group list changes, update manual_groups here and rerun npm run lpl:dashboard:insights.
